# TableauAssets

Wraps `dagster-tableau`'s workspace clients to materialize Tableau workbooks, dashboards, and sheets as Dagster external assets — full lineage from warehouse → semantic layer → Tableau dashboards.

<!-- FIELDS:START - auto-generated by tools/regen_readme_fields.py -->

## Fields

### Required

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `server_url` | `str` | Tableau server URL (e.g. 'https://10ay.online.tableau.com'). |
| `site_name` | `str` | Tableau site name. |

### Other

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `token_name_env_var` | `str` | `"TABLEAU_TOKEN_NAME"` | Env var with PAT name. |
| `token_value_env_var` | `str` | `"TABLEAU_TOKEN_VALUE"` | Env var with PAT value. |
| `online` | `bool` | `true` | Tableau Online (vs Server). |

<!-- FIELDS:END -->

## Example YAML
```yaml
type: dagster_component_templates.TableauAssetsComponent
attributes:
  server_url: <fill in>
  site_name: <fill in>
  token_name_env_var: <fill in>
  token_value_env_var: <fill in>
  online: <fill in>
```

## Requirements

```
dagster
dagster-tableau
```
